name: Customer Search
body:
Customer Search

The Customer Manager tool allows you to search and edit your customers, while simultaneously reporting on useful information at a glance. You can also create a customer directly from the Customer Manager tool.

Using Customer Manager

  1. Navigate to Customers > Customers (also available via Reports > Customer Reports > Customers or the "Customers" option from the Quick Links)
  2. Use the Search Filters (see below for detailed information on each filter)
    Tip: The Name fields support partial searches e.g. searching for the First Name "im" would display all results containing "im" - Imogen, Jim, Tim etc.


    Note: You can search for up to 25 commas or space-delimited customer IDs and Customer Numbers on the filter page

  3. Click Search
  4. The Search Results will be displayed

    Click to view full size
  5. To sort the results in a specific order click on each column heading; repeat to reverse the order between Ascending and Descending
  6. To Edit the customer click the Customer No. field or the Pencil icon
  7. To create a new CRM Contact (i.e. comments on an interaction with the customer) click the Person icon
    Related: For information on entering comments see POS - Public/Private Customer Comments)

  8. Click Print Report to print the results to a printer
  9. Click Export to Excel to download the results into a compressed zip file (the file is compressed due to the large amount of data - open the zip file to locate the spreadsheet)
    Tip: The export file can be used for reporting purposes, or even as a template for Mail Merges/EDMs as it contains names, addresses and contact information. For even more functionality refer to the Customer Activity Report - bulk create Gift Vouchers, modify Price Groups and more.

Back to top

Search Filters

FieldDetails
Customer NumberReference number internally assigned by Retail Express - this could be in the format of 300053 or for newer records AA-123456. Used for internal identification purposes only
Customer IDUnique Customer Identification number - this will be in the format of 300053
CompanyThe Company name
First NameThe contact's first name
Last NameThe contact's last name/surname
EmailThe contact's email address
Phone/MobileThe contact's phone number
Points BalanceIf Loyalty has been enabled and the customers are accruing points, this field will display the total outstanding points yet to be redeemed
Points EarnedIf Loyalty has been enabled and the customers are accruing points, this field will display the total points earned by the customer
Account CustomerTick this option to filter by customers configured as an Account Customer
Created Date From/ToUsed to select a date range of when the customer record was added to the Retail Express database
Last Updated From/ToUsed to select a date range of when the customer record was last updated e.g. the address details were updated. This includes any modifications made by editing the customer in POS

Back to top
